info.name: MCServerLauncher daemon V2 protocol
info.description: Generated from the frozen built-in RPC and event catalog. Connect to the selected /api/v2 WebSocket environment and pass the daemon token as the token query parameter.

items.name: auth
items.description: auth RPC methods.

query.name: token
query.description: Daemon main token or JWT sub-token.

api.description:
Gets the authenticated connection permissions.

Permission: `*`.

Request schema: `mcsl.schema.mcsl.auth.permissions.get.request`.
Result schema: `mcsl.schema.mcsl.auth.permissions.get.result`.

items.name: daemon
items.description: daemon RPC methods.

query.name: token
query.description: Daemon main token or JWT sub-token.

api.description:
Gets the daemon time for connection-latency measurement.

Permission: `*`.

Request schema: `mcsl.schema.mcsl.daemon.ping.request`.
Result schema: `mcsl.schema.mcsl.daemon.ping.result`.

items.name: discovery
items.description: discovery RPC methods.

query.name: token
query.description: Daemon main token or JWT sub-token.

api.description:
Gets the frozen runtime OpenRPC protocol document.

Permission: `*`.

Request schema: `mcsl.schema.rpc.discover.request`.
Result schema: `mcsl.schema.rpc.discover.result`.

items.name: events
items.description: events RPC methods.

query.name: token
query.description: Daemon main token or JWT sub-token.

api.description:
Subscribes the connection to a typed server event.

Permission: `*`.

Request schema: `mcsl.schema.mcsl.event.subscribe.request`.
Result schema: `mcsl.schema.mcsl.event.subscribe.result`.

query.name: token
query.description: Daemon main token or JWT sub-token.

api.description:
Removes the connection subscription for a typed server event.

Permission: `*`.

Request schema: `mcsl.schema.mcsl.event.unsubscribe.request`.
Result schema: `mcsl.schema.mcsl.event.unsubscribe.result`.

query.name: token
query.description: Daemon main token or JWT sub-token.

api.description:
Gets persisted event rules for an instance.

Permission: `*`.

Request schema: `mcsl.schema.mcsl.instance.event-rules.get.request`.
Result schema: `mcsl.schema.mcsl.instance.event-rules.get.result`.

query.name: token
query.description: Daemon main token or JWT sub-token.

api.description:
Persists and replaces event rules for an instance.

Permission: `*`.

Request schema: `mcsl.schema.mcsl.instance.event-rules.update.request`.
Result schema: `mcsl.schema.mcsl.instance.event-rules.update.result`.

items.name: files
items.description: files RPC methods.

query.name: token
query.description: Daemon main token or JWT sub-token.

api.description:
Copies a contained directory.

Permission: `mcsl.daemon.file.copy.directory`.

Request schema: `mcsl.schema.mcsl.directory.copy.request`.
Result schema: `mcsl.schema.mcsl.directory.copy.result`.

query.name: token
query.description: Daemon main token or JWT sub-token.

api.description:
Creates a contained directory.

Permission: `mcsl.daemon.file.create.directory`.

Request schema: `mcsl.schema.mcsl.directory.create.request`.
Result schema: `mcsl.schema.mcsl.directory.create.result`.

query.name: token
query.description: Daemon main token or JWT sub-token.

api.description:
Deletes a contained directory.

Permission: `mcsl.daemon.file.delete.directory`.

Request schema: `mcsl.schema.mcsl.directory.delete.request`.
Result schema: `mcsl.schema.mcsl.directory.delete.result`.

query.name: token
query.description: Daemon main token or JWT sub-token.

api.description:
Gets contained directory metadata and entries.

Permission: `mcsl.daemon.file.info.directory`.

Request schema: `mcsl.schema.mcsl.directory.info.get.request`.
Result schema: `mcsl.schema.mcsl.directory.info.get.result`.

query.name: token
query.description: Daemon main token or JWT sub-token.

api.description:
Moves a contained directory.

Permission: `mcsl.daemon.file.move.directory`.

Request schema: `mcsl.schema.mcsl.directory.move.request`.
Result schema: `mcsl.schema.mcsl.directory.move.result`.

query.name: token
query.description: Daemon main token or JWT sub-token.

api.description:
Renames a contained directory.

Permission: `mcsl.daemon.file.rename.directory`.

Request schema: `mcsl.schema.mcsl.directory.rename.request`.
Result schema: `mcsl.schema.mcsl.directory.rename.result`.

query.name: token
query.description: Daemon main token or JWT sub-token.

api.description:
Copies a contained file.

Permission: `mcsl.daemon.file.copy.file`.

Request schema: `mcsl.schema.mcsl.file.copy.request`.
Result schema: `mcsl.schema.mcsl.file.copy.result`.

query.name: token
query.description: Daemon main token or JWT sub-token.

api.description:
Deletes a contained file.

Permission: `mcsl.daemon.file.delete.file`.

Request schema: `mcsl.schema.mcsl.file.delete.request`.
Result schema: `mcsl.schema.mcsl.file.delete.result`.

query.name: token
query.description: Daemon main token or JWT sub-token.

api.description:
Closes a download session.

Permission: `mcsl.daemon.file.download`.

Request schema: `mcsl.schema.mcsl.file.download.close.request`.
Result schema: `mcsl.schema.mcsl.file.download.close.result`.

query.name: token
query.description: Daemon main token or JWT sub-token.

api.description:
Opens a bounded binary download session.

Permission: `mcsl.daemon.file.download`.

Request schema: `mcsl.schema.mcsl.file.download.open.request`.
Result schema: `mcsl.schema.mcsl.file.download.open.result`.

query.name: token
query.description: Daemon main token or JWT sub-token.

api.description:
Requests the next binary download chunk.

Permission: `mcsl.daemon.file.download`.

Request schema: `mcsl.schema.mcsl.file.download.read.request`.
Result schema: `mcsl.schema.mcsl.file.download.read.result`.

query.name: token
query.description: Daemon main token or JWT sub-token.

api.description:
Gets contained file metadata.

Permission: `mcsl.daemon.file.info.file`.

Request schema: `mcsl.schema.mcsl.file.info.get.request`.
Result schema: `mcsl.schema.mcsl.file.info.get.result`.

query.name: token
query.description: Daemon main token or JWT sub-token.

api.description:
Moves a contained file.

Permission: `mcsl.daemon.file.move.file`.

Request schema: `mcsl.schema.mcsl.file.move.request`.
Result schema: `mcsl.schema.mcsl.file.move.result`.

query.name: token
query.description: Daemon main token or JWT sub-token.

api.description:
Renames a contained file.

Permission: `mcsl.daemon.file.rename.file`.

Request schema: `mcsl.schema.mcsl.file.rename.request`.
Result schema: `mcsl.schema.mcsl.file.rename.result`.

query.name: token
query.description: Daemon main token or JWT sub-token.

api.description:
Cancels an upload session.

Permission: `mcsl.daemon.file.upload`.

Request schema: `mcsl.schema.mcsl.file.upload.cancel.request`.
Result schema: `mcsl.schema.mcsl.file.upload.cancel.result`.

query.name: token
query.description: Daemon main token or JWT sub-token.

api.description:
Validates and commits an upload session.

Permission: `mcsl.daemon.file.upload`.

Request schema: `mcsl.schema.mcsl.file.upload.close.request`.
Result schema: `mcsl.schema.mcsl.file.upload.close.result`.

query.name: token
query.description: Daemon main token or JWT sub-token.

api.description:
Opens a bounded binary upload session.

Permission: `mcsl.daemon.file.upload`.

Request schema: `mcsl.schema.mcsl.file.upload.open.request`.
Result schema: `mcsl.schema.mcsl.file.upload.open.result`.

items.name: instances
items.description: instances RPC methods.

query.name: token
query.description: Daemon main token or JWT sub-token.

api.description:
Gets the current immutable instance catalog snapshot.

Permission: `*`.

Request schema: `mcsl.schema.mcsl.instance.catalog.get.request`.
Result schema: `mcsl.schema.mcsl.instance.catalog.get.result`.

query.name: token
query.description: Daemon main token or JWT sub-token.

api.description:
Sends a command to a running instance.

Permission: `*`.

Request schema: `mcsl.schema.mcsl.instance.command.send.request`.
Result schema: `mcsl.schema.mcsl.instance.command.send.result`.

query.name: token
query.description: Daemon main token or JWT sub-token.

api.description:
Creates and persists a new instance.

Permission: `*`.

Request schema: `mcsl.schema.mcsl.instance.create.request`.
Result schema: `mcsl.schema.mcsl.instance.create.result`.

query.name: token
query.description: Daemon main token or JWT sub-token.

api.description:
Immediately signals an instance process to halt.

Permission: `*`.

Request schema: `mcsl.schema.mcsl.instance.halt.request`.
Result schema: `mcsl.schema.mcsl.instance.halt.result`.

query.name: token
query.description: Daemon main token or JWT sub-token.

api.description:
Gets retained log lines for an instance.

Permission: `*`.

Request schema: `mcsl.schema.mcsl.instance.log.get.request`.
Result schema: `mcsl.schema.mcsl.instance.log.get.result`.

query.name: token
query.description: Daemon main token or JWT sub-token.

api.description:
Removes a stopped instance.

Permission: `*`.

Request schema: `mcsl.schema.mcsl.instance.remove.request`.
Result schema: `mcsl.schema.mcsl.instance.remove.result`.

query.name: token
query.description: Daemon main token or JWT sub-token.

api.description:
Gets the current report for an instance.

Permission: `*`.

Request schema: `mcsl.schema.mcsl.instance.report.get.request`.
Result schema: `mcsl.schema.mcsl.instance.report.get.result`.

query.name: token
query.description: Daemon main token or JWT sub-token.

api.description:
Gets current reports for all instances.

Permission: `*`.

Request schema: `mcsl.schema.mcsl.instance.report.list.request`.
Result schema: `mcsl.schema.mcsl.instance.report.list.result`.

query.name: token
query.description: Daemon main token or JWT sub-token.

api.description:
Gets editable settings for an instance.

Permission: `*`.

Request schema: `mcsl.schema.mcsl.instance.settings.get.request`.
Result schema: `mcsl.schema.mcsl.instance.settings.get.result`.

query.name: token
query.description: Daemon main token or JWT sub-token.

api.description:
Persists and applies instance settings.

Permission: `*`.

Request schema: `mcsl.schema.mcsl.instance.settings.update.request`.
Result schema: `mcsl.schema.mcsl.instance.settings.update.result`.

query.name: token
query.description: Daemon main token or JWT sub-token.

api.description:
Starts an instance.

Permission: `*`.

Request schema: `mcsl.schema.mcsl.instance.start.request`.
Result schema: `mcsl.schema.mcsl.instance.start.result`.

query.name: token
query.description: Daemon main token or JWT sub-token.

api.description:
Requests a graceful instance stop.

Permission: `*`.

Request schema: `mcsl.schema.mcsl.instance.stop.request`.
Result schema: `mcsl.schema.mcsl.instance.stop.result`.

items.name: system
items.description: system RPC methods.

query.name: token
query.description: Daemon main token or JWT sub-token.

api.description:
Lists Java runtimes available to the daemon.

Permission: `mcsl.daemon.java_list`.

Request schema: `mcsl.schema.mcsl.java.list.request`.
Result schema: `mcsl.schema.mcsl.java.list.result`.

query.name: token
query.description: Daemon main token or JWT sub-token.

api.description:
Gets daemon host system information.

Permission: `*`.

Request schema: `mcsl.schema.mcsl.system.info.get.request`.
Result schema: `mcsl.schema.mcsl.system.info.get.result`.

items.name: mcsl.event.daemon.report
items.content:
# mcsl.event.daemon.report

Publishes a periodic daemon system report.

Permission: `*`.

Data (required): `mcsl.schema.mcsl.event.daemon.report.data`.

Meta: omitted.

items.name: mcsl.event.instance.catalog.changed
items.content:
# mcsl.event.instance.catalog.changed

Publishes an ordered instance catalog delta.

Permission: `*`.

Data (required): `mcsl.schema.mcsl.event.instance.catalog.changed.data`.

Meta: omitted.

items.name: mcsl.event.instance.log
items.content:
# mcsl.event.instance.log

Publishes a log line emitted by an instance.

Permission: `*`.

Data (required): `mcsl.schema.mcsl.event.instance.log.data`.

Meta (required): `mcsl.schema.mcsl.event.instance.log.meta`.

items.name: mcsl.event.notification
items.content:
# mcsl.event.notification

Publishes an event-rule notification.

Permission: `*`.

Data (required): `mcsl.schema.mcsl.event.notification.data`.

Meta (required): `mcsl.schema.mcsl.event.notification.meta`.

variables.description: Set a daemon token locally; never commit a real token.
